---
title: "Evolution of Representations in the Transformer"
description: "Lena Voita on how representations evolve through Transformer layers."
author: "synesis"
date: "2019-09-17"
categories: [NLP, deep learning, transformers, paper]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Evolution of Representations in the Transformer. Image from [Lena Voita](https://lena-voita.github.io/posts/emnlp19_evolution.html).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

<https://lnkd.in/geeeDXT>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_evolution-of-representations-in-the-transformer-activity-6579738464613474304-PqVp).*
